title: wolftpm-tss crate root does not re-export WolfTpmLinuxDev, WolfTpmSwtpm, Error
description: wolftpm/src/lib.rs re-exports Device, EccKey, Error at crate root. wolftpm-tss/src/lib.rs does not re-export WolfTpmLinuxDev, WolfTpmSwtpm, or Error — callers must write 'use wolftpm_tss::connection::WolfTpmLinuxDev' instead of 'use wolftpm_tss::WolfTpmLinuxDev'. Inconsistent between the two crates. Add pub use in lib.rs, mirroring wolftpm pattern.
